message:
test(providers): add gap provider contract tests and VCR fixtures for 5 new providers

Expand provider conformance testing to cover 5 newly onboarded
OpenAI-compatible providers: groq, cerebras, openrouter, moonshotai
(Kimi), and alibaba (Qwen/DashScope).

Contract tests (per provider):
- Factory routing and API endpoint validation
- Bearer authentication header verification
- Request body shape (model, stream, messages array, content-type)
- Tool schema translation (function calling format)
- Text response SSE decoding (TextDelta + Done events)
- Tool call response SSE decoding (ToolCallStart + Done events)
- HTTP 401 authentication error handling
- HTTP 429 rate limit error handling

Also expands PRESET_PROVIDERS array from 5 to 9 entries and adds a
shared openai_error_json() helper and gap_provider_helpers module to
reduce boilerplate across the per-provider test suites.

VCR fixtures (7 per provider × 5 providers = 35 new fixtures):
Each provider has fixtures for auth-401, bad-request-400,
rate-limit-429, simple-text, tool-call-single, tool-call-multiple,
and unicode-text scenarios, enabling offline conformance testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+{
+  "version": "1.0",
+  "test_name": "verify_alibaba_error_auth_401",
+  "recorded_at": "2026-02-13T09:15:39.349Z",
+  "interactions": [
+    {
+      "request": {
+        "method": "POST",
+        "url": "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1/chat/completions",
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Authorization",
+            "Bearer [REDACTED]"
+          ],
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ]
+        ]
+      },
+      "response": {
+        "status": 401,
+        "headers": [
+          [
+            "Content-Type",
+            "application/json"
+          ]
+        ],
+        "body_chunks": [
+          "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"invalid_api_key\",\"message\":\"Simulated error 401\",\"param\":null,\"type\":\"invalid_request_error\"}}"
+        ]
+      }
+    }
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file
